questionHtml: Bohr modified the Rutherford model by introducing the condition mvr = n h 2 π . Outline the reason for this modification.
markschemeHtml:
the electrons accelerate and so radiate energy

they would therefore spiral into the nucleus/atoms would be unstable

electrons have discrete/only certain energy levels

the only orbits where electrons do not radiate are those that satisfy the Bohr condition «mvr = n h 2 π »

[3 marks]

meta.title: Bohr modified the Rutherford model by introducing the condition mvr = n h 2 π . Outline the reason for this modification.
